name: Sensational Curried Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small red onion, sliced very thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard, curry powder, sugar, salt, and garlic in a small bowl.
2. Add the lemon juice to the mixture.
3. Whisk until well combined.
4. Gradually beat in the safflower oil using a whisk.
5. Set the dressing aside.
6. Clean (remove the pith) and section the oranges.
7. Marinate chicken in plain yogurt with curry powder, coriander, ginger, garlic, onion powder, and white pepper for several hours or overnight.
8. Grill the marinated chicken until done.
9. Serve the grilled chicken at room temperature over the salad.
